nasb.text: This will be a sign for you: you will find a baby wrapped in cloths and lying in a manger.”

esv.text: And this will be a sign for you: you will find a baby wrapped in swaddling cloths and lying in a manger.”

cnv.text: 你們要找到一個嬰孩，包著布，臥在馬槽裡，那就是記號了。”

ccb.text: 你们将看见一个婴孩包着布躺在马槽里，这就是给你们的记号。”

csbs.text: 你们会看见一个婴孩，用布包着，躺在马槽里；这就是给你们的标记。”
